name: RescueGroups
description: Search public adoptable dog records through RescueGroups.org with optional related breed, organization, location, and picture data.

auth.hint: Request a RescueGroups.org API key and send it in the Authorization header.

tools.name: search_dogs
tools.description: Search public adoptable dog records and optionally include related resources.

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated related resources such as breeds, locations, orgs, and pictures.

params.name: data
params.description: JSON:API search filters, sorting, and pagination document.
